attacking_style: Breakaway specialist who targets long-range moves on opportunistic stages, particularly on familiar Italian terrain. Shows sprinting ability to finish moves when break succeeds.
team_tactics: Israel Premier Tech uses him as an attacking animator in breakaways, though team cohesion appears problematic when multiple riders commit. Also deployed as climbing domestique when needed.
terrain_preference: Veneto roads and Italian stages where local knowledge provides advantage. Capable on climbs in pacing role but thrives in fragmented breaks on rolling terrain.
vulnerability: Team disorganization limits effectiveness when multiple teammates are scattered in breaks or forced to chase separately. Relies on breakaway success rather than GC contention ability.
key_patterns: Consistently targets breakaways across multiple Giro stages, positioning well in fragmented groups.
Dual role capability: animator in breaks and climbing domestique when team strategy requires.
Strong on home Veneto roads with Italian champion jersey, leveraging local knowledge and motivation.
Israel Premier Tech coordination issues visible when multiple riders commit without unified plan.
form_trajectory: positive: Multiple breakaway successes and podium finishes at 2023 Giro, showing consistent ability to animate and execute
